$$ b = 2 $$

$$ \text{Area} = a \times b = 2 \times 2 = 4 $$

**3. Calculate the volume:**
The volume of a prism is given by the formula $V = \text{Base Area} \times \text{Height}$.
$$ V = 4 \times 4 $$
